channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped mattress besidec2 Roslin Way, 18th April
item.description:
Please remove this mattress lying on the pavement. Thank you. Cllr Alisa Igoe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Roslin Way, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbidh, 18th April
item.description:
The situation has been like this for over 3 months. There is also a broken vehicle on the site, which is creating a screen behind which the detritus has been dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deverell Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Swimming pool deep pothole, 18th April
item.description:
Could be private land but can this resolved?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pavilion Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of waste left by Veolia for years in rubbish chute today. Saw large rat running in there. Dead rat thee doors along by garage number 176, 18th April
item.description:
This chute has been littered with piles of decomposing waste for a year or two. Veolia send a lorry with one driver to collect the skip, so nobody is there to clear the floor after the skip has been removed. Such a simple operation Veolia are paid to carry out, presumably, but never do. So bad for our and our children's health.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th April
item.description:
People coming in vans in the evening and dumping rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs x 2 flytipped outside no 48 glenwood road, 18th April
item.description:
Rubbish outside 48/57/1 glenwood road not yet clearing Lewisham’s council despite reporting all incidents ya 7/10 days ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glenwood Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This huge tree is dead, 18th April
item.description:
This huge tree is dead and needs cutting down. Not sure if council or Rookery estates are responsible. Please advise.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A21, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All bin areas filthy along the bus stops, Tabernacle and UAL, 18th April
item.description:
There are several bins dotted along the bus stations between the Tabernacle and UAL building. The sidewalk surrounding the bins is soiled and filthy. It all needs pressure washing periodically.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elephant and Castle, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of stuff dumped outside rental property, 18th April
item.description:
This property (19 adolphus road) continually dumps stuff onto the street - apparently whenever someone moves out.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Adolphus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vagrancy, 18th April
item.description:
Person/ persons with two large Dogs appearing to be living in a Blue coloured Tent hidden under the branches of a Willow Tree approximately 40 metres to the left side of the green space entrance. This has apparently been reported to Bromley Council already, but the occupant/occupants of the tent have been using this area for over a week now. There does not sem to be any water bowls or other feeding/watering facilities for the Dogs, so this may also be an animal welfare issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shell Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van dumped here for over a month, 18th April
item.description:
This van was dumped weeks ago

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
